examples: She blew up at her assistant.
He tends to blow up over small things.
The building blew up in the movie.
The car blew up after the crash.
The bomb blew up at midnight.
He blew up when he heard the news.
They blew up the old bridge.
My dad blew up when I came home late.
example_translate: Папа разозлился, когда я пришёл домой поздно.
blow up.synonyms:
Взрываться - explode, detonate, burst
Вспылить, разозлиться (разговорное) - explode, lose temper, rage
